scripts.test: npm run test:node && npm run test:python
scripts.test:node: node --check scripts/agent-proof.mjs && node --check scripts/convert-integrations.mjs && node --test tests/agent-proof.test.mjs tests/convert-integrations.test.mjs
scripts.test:python: python3 -m py_compile scripts/agent_proof.py && python3 -m unittest tests/test_agent_proof.py
